overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a cozy medieval-style stone tavern interior with a burning fireplace. The camera pans across the room revealing a decorated Christmas tree and seated NPCs, while a translucent ghostly figure moves through the space in the opening moments.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cozy medieval tavern interior centered on a burning stone fireplace. A translucent ghostly figure drifts across the foreground from left to right while the camera remains stationary, capturing the warm firelight illuminating the leather furniture and stone architecture.

orange velvet sofa with curved wooden frame

circular wooden chandelier hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a decorated Christmas tree in the corner of the tavern, with the fireplace now visible on the right. Several NPCs are seated on orange sofas around a table, and a large wooden chandelier hangs from the stone ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot begins with a focused view of a warm hearth and expands into a wider reveal of a festive medieval tavern interior. It opens on a burning stone fireplace that casts a warm glow over leather furniture and stone architecture as a translucent ghostly figure drifts across the foreground. As the camera begins to pan left, the fireplace shifts to the right side of the frame to uncover a decorated Christmas tree tucked into the corner. The scene then opens further to reveal NPCs seated on orange sofas around a table, while a large wooden chandelier comes into view hanging from the stone ceiling.
